calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Moyra Triguero (Beneficiary/Former Co-Trustee).
Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.
John Paul in Propria Persona.

Ms. Rasch stated that her Client was told to include everyone's fee requests with a stipulation that she would take no position. Mr. Paul withdraws his creditor's claim. Mr. Skootksy and Mr. Paul presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to fees. The First and Final Account of Successor Trustee, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2330 34th Ave, San Francisco, Ca 94116)
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $1,448,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 21, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Ms. Rasch is to calculate the amount of the additional bond.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To: (1) Remove Co-Trustees Of Trust A; (2) To Appoint Successor Trustee Or, Alternatively, To Suspend The Powers Of The Co-Trustees Of Trust
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Moyra Trigueiro (Co-Trustee).
John Paul (Co-Trustee) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Paul stated that the problem is with selling the house, that they disagree on repairing of a set of stairs that are out of code and there is a problem with disclosure, that they have already distributed $1,353,000.00, and that he has requested fees, but has not taken anything. Mr. Skootksy stated that an e mail was sent last Friday to the Siblings stating that John Paul hereby resigns as Co-Trustee of this Trust, and that his Client is ready to step down and Debra Dolch is ready to come in. Mr. Paul also stated that he is only willing to resign if this (fixing the stairs) can be done within 60-days (if the Court is willing), and expressed concern regarding fees to be incurred. Mr. Skootksy clarified that this petition is only in reference to Trust - A. Both Co-Trustees agreed to resign. The Court granted the Petition to Remove Co-Trustees of Trust, etc. (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $30,000.00.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
